CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2019 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2019 Continued To May-07-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION - Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Settlement Ccp Section 664.6
Off Calendar Feb-06-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ryan P Knutson, Esq., Bledsoe, Diestel, Treppa & Crane LLP, appearing for Plaintiff
No other appearance.

*The Law & Motion calendar for February 6, 2019 is heard by Judge Harold E. Kahn due to the unavailability of Judge Ethan P. Schulman.*

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ZOHRA JAFFRI'S MOTION For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Settlement Ccp Section 664.6.

Plaintiff Zohra Jaffri's motion for entry of judgment pursuant to settlement per Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6 is granted. No opposition was filed.

Order is signed. Plaintiff's counsel to submit a proposed judgment.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-05-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
